narrative:
Precinct Sandy Twp East (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 805 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.2 percentage points.
